critical.issue: validate_path() is advisory-only — logs warning but returns the resolved path even when outside allowed boundaries, making the check ineffective
critical.fix: Return None (reject) when the path is outside allowed_bases

critical.issue: No path validation on input_path or output_dir — user-supplied strings passed directly to subprocess
critical.fix: Call self.validate_path() on input_path and output_dir

critical.issue: Format parameter from user dict passed directly to CLI without validation — possible argument injection
critical.fix: Whitelist allowed format values ('jpg', 'png') and reject anything else

warnings.issue: Direct Popen bypasses BaseEngine._execute_command() — no setsid, no cancellation support, risks zombie processes
No path validation on video_path or output_dir
warnings.fix: Call self.validate_path() on all user-supplied paths

warnings.issue: No path validation — arbitrary file paths fed to Sharp binary
warnings.fix: Call self.validate_path() on input_path, output_path, checkpoint

warnings.issue: No path validation on directory served over HTTP — any local process could read arbitrary files
Custom args whitelist allows unvalidated values through
run_brush() treats int return from engine.train() as subprocess object — will crash with AttributeError
run_sharp() same bug — treats int return as process object
Full command with all arguments logged to UI — may expose sensitive path info
warnings.fix: Redact sensitive path components in logs

warnings.issue: Missing 'tr' import — NameError at runtime when status_callback is provided

info.issue: preexec_fn=os.setsid deprecated in Python 3.12+ in favor of process_group=0
urlretrieve may not verify TLS certs, no progress feedback for large downloads
Binary fallback 'resolve_binary(x) or x' defers failure to subprocess time
Inconsistent argument format for COLMAP flags
